name: welcome-messages
description: Empty-chat greeting + hero growl. ChatEmptyGreeting fetches /v1/greetings (served by the bridge half of this module) and inserts the hour-and-locale-appropriate line above the YHA hero. ChatHeroGrowl plays a click-and-hold space-drone audio gesture on the hero. Both components are non-essential — disabling the module leaves the empty chat with just the hero (no greeting line, no growl).
